item.title: Vimium shortcuts
item.description: Vimium is a Chrome extension that provides keyboard-based navigation and control of the web in the spirit of the Vim editor. Keyboard Bindings # Modifier keys are specified as c-x, m-x, and a-xfor ctrl+x, meta+x, and alt+x respectively. See the next section for how to customize these bindings. Once you have Vimium installed, you can see this list of key bindings at any time by typing ?. Navigating the current page:
